User.title: User Profile
User.description: User clinical profile, including physical metrics and cycle configs.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user (matching Firebase Auth UID)

name.description: Name or pseudonym of the patient

lastPeriodStartDate.description: Start date of the user's most recent period

preferences.description: General application preferences like language, theme, layout density

healthHistory.description: Chronic status, symptoms or historical PCOS records

PeriodCycle.title: Period Cycle
PeriodCycle.description: Menu of historical period and cycle metrics including durations.

id.description: Unique identifier for this specific logged cycle

cycleLength.description: Elapsed cycle days since the prior cycle

/users/{userId}.description: Primary clinical profile collections matching authenticated user IDs.

/users/{userId}/cycles/{cycleId}.description: Subcollection of 6 or more cycle intervals logged by this patient.
